title: Right of co-owners to create single servitude in partition of land
doc_html:
§67.  Right of co-owners to create single servitude in partition of land

Co-owners of land constituting a continuous whole may partition it and reserve a single mineral servitude in favor of one or more of them.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §67, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.

§67.  Right of co-owners to create single servitude in partition of land
Co-owners of land constituting a continuous whole may partition it and reserve a single mineral servitude in favor of one or more of them.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §67, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
